/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/benchmark_reader.dir/test/benchmark/benchmark_reader.cpp.o -o benchmark_reader   -L/root/ros2_ws/build/libyaml_vendor/libyaml_install/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/libyaml_vendor/libyaml_install/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbenchmark_main.so.1.5.3 /opt/ros/humble/lib/libperformance_test_fixture.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib/librcpputils.so -lyaml /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbenchmark.so.1.5.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /opt/ros/humble/lib/libmemory_tools.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
